blended.narrative: Mount Bohemia is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Wednesday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
